nf:module.nf:name: pipeline_datapath
nf:module.nf:description: Registers for Pipeline CPU with Trace Buffer

nf:register.nf:name: imem_interact
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.

nf:register.nf:name: imem_write
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.

nf:register.nf:name: imem_rw_address
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.

nf:register.nf:name: imem_wdata
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.

nf:register.nf:name: dmem_interact
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.

nf:register.nf:name: dmem_write
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.

nf:register.nf:name: dmem_rw_address
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.

nf:register.nf:name: dmem_wdata_hi
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.

nf:register.nf:name: dmem_wdata_lo
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.

nf:register.nf:name: imem_rdata
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.

nf:register.nf:name: dmem_rdata_lo
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.

nf:register.nf:name: dmem_rdata_hi
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.

nf:register.nf:name: hwreg1
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.
